ranked_movies.title: Twins
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed in the top post for its groundbreaking backend deal and as a prime example of an action star successfully transitioning to comedy. It was a massive commercial success and a cultural touchstone.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a benchmark for successful comedy and cited as a recent example of the genre's potential in theaters. Liam Neeson's performance was specifically highlighted.

ranked_movies.title: Kindergarten Cop
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a classic Arnold Schwarzenegger comedy that represents the perfect mix of hilarious and serious, making it highly rewatchable.

ranked_movies.title: True Lies
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended alongside Kindergarten Cop as another exemplary Arnold Schwarzenegger film that masterfully blends action and comedy.

ranked_movies.title: My Cousin Vinny
ranked_movies.reason: Brought up multiple times as an example of a comedy with an Oscar-winning performance (Marisa Tomei) and is a frequently recommended classic.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed heavily as a prime example of a horror film (and specifically Toni Collette's performance) being unjustly overlooked by major awards like the Oscars.

ranked_movies.reason: Top recommendation in a thread asking for uplifting comedies, praised for the performances of Robin Williams and Nathan Lane.

ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its beautiful scenery, amazing music, and spirit-lifting qualities, perfectly matching the request for an uplifting comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Step Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a personal go-to comedy that 'works every time' for lifting spirits, indicating its high rewatch value and popularity.

ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a 'masterpiece of a show' in a thread asking for comedy series suggestions, indicating its high regard among fans.
